mano_cua.result_summary: 应用无法完成初始化，始终卡在 loading 状态。多次刷新和导航到 localhost:4000/#/login 均只显示右侧的 loading spinner，登录表单从未出现。无法执行输入错误密码的测试。应用存在 JavaScript 初始化错误导致整体不可用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: After forced refresh, page remains in the same loading state with spinner on the right side. This is a persistent issue - the Vue application cannot complete initialization and the login form never appears.
